id: Settle For Less Before You Exit
folderName: Settle For Less Before You Exit
setting: デートをドタキャンされた友人Aに対し、ずっと見守ってきた幼馴染・男友達Bが「彼ではなく僕を選んで」と熱く語りかけるシーン。
lyrics:
Everybody deserves somebody
But girl nobody can love like I do

You could be a super model
President or write a novel
But he's holding your back
And you're better than that
He won't even buy you flowers
Stay up late and talk for hours
I think I can do that
I can be better than that
You should know...

Everybody deserves somebody
But girl nobody can love you like I do
And I'm not perfect but you're so worth it
I wanna change the world for you
So baby don't settle for less
You deserve the best
You're better than the rest
And I can be the best
So baby don't settle for less

I've been watching in front the sidelines
His mistakes become my guidelines
Cause he's holding your back, And you're better than that
I will love to buy you flowers
Take the time to talk for hours
Yeah I can do that. I can be better than that
You should know...

He takes you for granted
Girl I can't stand it
Watching you panic over him
See he's just a nobody
I can be somebody
Someone to love til' the end

lyricsJa.en: Everybody deserves somebody
lyricsJa.ja: 誰だって誰かに愛される権利がある

lyricsJa.en: But girl nobody can love like I do
lyricsJa.ja: でもね、僕ほど君を愛せる人はいないんだ

lyricsJa.en: You could be a super model
lyricsJa.ja: 君はスーパーモデルにだって

lyricsJa.en: President or write a novel
lyricsJa.ja: 大統領にだってなれるし、小説を書くことだできる

lyricsJa.en: But he's holding your back
lyricsJa.ja: でも、彼が君の邪魔をしてるんだ

lyricsJa.en: And you're better than that
lyricsJa.ja: 君はそんな扱いを受けるような人じゃないよ

lyricsJa.en: He won't even buy you flowers
lyricsJa.ja: 彼は君に花さえ買ってくれないし

lyricsJa.en: Stay up late and talk for hours
lyricsJa.ja: 夜更かしして、何時間も君の話を聞いてくれたりもしない

lyricsJa.en: I think I can do that
lyricsJa.ja: 僕ならそれができると思うし

lyricsJa.en: I can be better than that
lyricsJa.ja: 彼よりも君を幸せにできるよ

lyricsJa.en: You should know...
lyricsJa.ja: わかってほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: Everybody deserves somebody
lyricsJa.ja: 誰だって誰かに愛されるべきなんだ

lyricsJa.en: But girl nobody can love you like I do
lyricsJa.ja: でもね、僕ほど君を愛せる人はいないよ

lyricsJa.en: And I'm not perfect but you're so worth it
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は完璧じゃないってわかってる、でも君はそれだけ尽くす価値がある人なんだ

lyricsJa.en: I wanna change the world for you
lyricsJa.ja: 君のために世界だって変えたい

lyricsJa.en: So baby don't settle for less
lyricsJa.ja: だから、今の状態で妥協なんてしないでほしい

lyricsJa.en: You deserve the best
lyricsJa.ja: 君は最高の愛情を受け取る資格がある

lyricsJa.en: You're better than the rest
lyricsJa.ja: 君は他の誰よりも素晴らしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I can be the best
lyricsJa.ja: そして僕は、君にとっての最高の人になれる

lyricsJa.en: So baby don't settle for less
lyricsJa.ja: だからね、妥協なんてしないで

lyricsJa.en: I've been watching in front the sidelines
lyricsJa.ja: ずっとサイドラインから君を見守ってきたんだ

lyricsJa.en: His mistakes become my guidelines
lyricsJa.ja: 彼の失敗が、僕にとっての道標になってるよ

lyricsJa.en: Cause he's holding your back, And you're better than that
lyricsJa.ja: だって彼が君の邪魔をしてるから。君はそんな扱いを受けるような人じゃない

lyricsJa.en: I will love to buy you flowers
lyricsJa.ja: 僕なら喜んで君に花を買うし

lyricsJa.en: Take the time to talk for hours
lyricsJa.ja: 時間をかけて何時間でも話を聞くよ

lyricsJa.en: Yeah I can do that. I can be better than that
lyricsJa.ja: そう、僕にならできる。彼よりも君を幸せにできるよ

lyricsJa.en: You should know...
lyricsJa.ja: わかってほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: He takes you for granted
lyricsJa.ja: 彼は君がいることを「当たり前」だと思ってる

lyricsJa.en: Girl I can't stand it
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、僕はそれが我慢できないんだ

lyricsJa.en: Watching you panic over him
lyricsJa.ja: 彼のために君が動揺しているのを見るのがね

lyricsJa.en: See he's just a nobody
lyricsJa.ja: いいかい、彼はただの取るに足らない奴さ

lyricsJa.en: I can be somebody
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は君にとっての「特別な誰か」になれるよ

lyricsJa.en: Someone to love til' the end
lyricsJa.ja: 最後まで君を愛し抜く誰かにさ

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.japanese: 彼、またデートをキャンセルしたの。もう本当にうんざり。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Honestly, he takes you for granted.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, he takes you for granted.

sentences.text: You're always the one making an effort.
sentences.displayHtml: You're always the one making an effort.

conversation.japanese: 正直言って、彼は君がいることを当たり前だと思ってるよ。いつも君ばかりが努力してるじゃないか。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I just don't know what to do.
sentences.displayHtml: I just don't know what to do.

conversation.japanese: どうしたらいいのかわからないわ。私、期待しすぎなのかな？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: No, everyone deserves to be treated well.
sentences.displayHtml: No, everyone deserves to be treated well.

sentences.text: Watching you panic over him all the time just hurts.
sentences.displayHtml: Watching you panic over him all the time just hurts.

conversation.japanese: いや、誰だって大切にされる権利はあるんだ。彼のために君が動揺しているのを見るのは、ただ辛いんだよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I love him, but I feel stuck.
sentences.displayHtml: I love him, but I feel stuck.

conversation.japanese: ただ…彼のことは愛してるけど、行き詰まっている気がするの。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: That's because he's holding your back.
sentences.displayHtml: That's because he's holding your back.

sentences.text: He won't even try to understand how you feel.
sentences.displayHtml: He won't even try to understand how you feel.

conversation.japanese: それは彼が君の足を引っ張っているからさ。彼は君がどう感じているか、理解しようとさえしないだろ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I deserve someone better, don't I?
sentences.displayHtml: I deserve someone better, don't I?

conversation.japanese: その通りね。私にはもっといい人がふさわしいわよね？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: }} nobody can make you as happy as you deserve, except maybe someone right in front of you.
sentences.displayHtml: }} nobody can make you as happy as you deserve, except maybe someone right in front of you.

sentences.text: You're so worth it, so please don't settle for less.
sentences.displayHtml: You're so worth it, so please don't settle for less.

conversation.japanese: ああ。わかってほしいんだけど…君にふさわしい幸せをあげられる奴はいないよ、たぶん目の前にいる誰か以外はね。君はそれだけ価値がある人なんだ、だからお願いだ、これで妥協なんてしないで。
